pages.text: $(thing)Rope Bridge Bundles$() are throwable placement tools that create rope bridge spans across gaps.$(br2)Hold right-click to charge, release to throw, and a bridge will form along a valid straight path to the hit point.
Crafted from jute fiber and lumber. Each craft yields 16 bundles.

pages.title: Adjusting and Pickup
pages.text: Right-click placed bridge planks with a $(thing)Stick$() to adjust local height offsets.$(br2)Shift-right-click a rope bridge segment to retrieve the bridge.

pages.name: Rope Bridge
pages.text: A simple bridge span between two anchor surfaces.
